overall.description: A cinematic night scene depicting a group of people gathered around a campfire on an urban rooftop, with illuminated twin skyscrapers visible in the distant skyline. The stylized lighting and aesthetic suggest this is game engine footage, featuring warm firelight contrasting against cool blue city ambient lighting.

segments.scene_description: A static nighttime scene on an urban rooftop where a group of people gather around a central campfire. The warm firelight illuminates the figures and contrasts with the cool blue glow of the distant twin skyscrapers and city skyline. Peace sign structures frame the scene on both sides, and scattered chairs and debris suggest a casual, makeshift gathering space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric nighttime view of an urban rooftop gathering that emphasizes the contrast between intimate warmth and a cold city expanse. It begins centered on a group of people huddled around a glowing campfire, where the flickering orange light illuminates their figures against the dark rooftop. As the eye moves outward, the warm radiance of the fire gives way to the cool blue ambient glow of the surrounding environment, framed by peace sign structures on either side. The scene then expands to reveal scattered chairs and debris across the makeshift space before settling on the distant skyline, where illuminated twin skyscrapers pierce the night sky.
